title: Crispy Sweet Potato Hash
description: This umami-rich dish features crispy sweet potatoes served with a side of savory miso glaze and topped with sliced avocado for a Malaysian-inspired brunch.

ingredients.name: 1 large sweet potato
ingredients.notes: Peel and dice into small cubes

ingredients.name: 4 slices of bacon, diced
ingredients.notes: Optional for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Avocado slices
ingredients.notes: Approximately 1/4 of a ripe avocado per slice

ingredients.name: Sesame oil for glazing (optional)
ingredients.notes: For serving the miso glaze with the dish

instructions: Combine sweet potato cubes, coconut oil, lime juice, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated. Ensure the potatoes don’t get too mushy or they will become soggy during air frying.
Divide the mixture into portions that fit well inside your air fryer basket for even cooking.
Air-fry at 350°F (175°C) for about 25 minutes, flipping halfway through cooking. You may need to adjust the cooking time based on your air fryer's capacity and the desired crispiness level.
While sweet potatoes are cooking, prepare the miso glaze by mixing together sesame oil, a small amount of hot water (enough to make it pourable), and 1-2 tsp of soy sauce. Adjust seasoning as needed.
When ready, place the cooked sweet potato on a serving plate or in individual portions. Drizzle with the warm miso glaze and garnish with sesame seeds and avocado slices.
